subcodes.first_line: At times, in a state of utmost supplication, turning unto God, I visit the illumined resting-place of Shamsu'l-Vuzará [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از اوقات در کمال ابتهال متوجّهاً الی اللّه قبر منوّر شمس‌الوزرا را
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
